pendingTranslations.Public sign-ups are ENABLED. Anyone can: Public sign-ups are ENABLED. Anyone can register an account from the website.
pendingTranslations.Send an invite link. The coach will set: Send an invite link. The coach will set their own password when they sign up.
pendingTranslations.Enter this code at the facility door key: Enter this code at the facility door keypad. Valid for your session time only.
pendingTranslations.No coaches have been created yet. Create: No coaches have been created yet. Create a coach account from the admin panel.
pendingTranslations.Sign in to view and manage your bookings: Sign in to view and manage your bookings, waitlist entries, and notifications.
pendingTranslations.BETTER_AUTH_SECRET environment variable: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET environment variable is required. Set it in Convex dashboard.
pendingTranslations.Public sign-ups are DISABLED. Only admin: Public sign-ups are DISABLED. Only admins can create new user accounts manually.
pendingTranslations.Show up at your booked time and enjoy yo: Show up at your booked time and enjoy your session. Equipment available on-site.
pendingTranslations.Tracker blocked by CORP policy — analyti: Tracker blocked by CORP policy — analytics disabled but app continues normally
pendingTranslations.Access your profile, manage your assigne: Access your profile, manage your assigned coaches, and view your account details.
pendingTranslations.Bookings can be cancelled or changed up: Bookings can be cancelled or changed up to 2 hours before the session start time.
pendingTranslations.No athletes assigned. Athletes need to s: No athletes assigned. Athletes need to select you as their coach in their profile.
pendingTranslations.Athletes need to select you as their coa: Athletes need to select you as their coach in their profile before they appear here.
pendingTranslations.Clear ALL data: bookings, users, setting: Clear ALL data: bookings, users, settings, discount codes, payments. Complete reset.
pendingTranslations.Bookings can only be cancelled or change: Bookings can only be cancelled or changed at least 2 hours before the session starts.
pendingTranslations.Create a new coach account with login cr: Create a new coach account with login credentials. The coach can sign in immediately.
pendingTranslations.Please arrive 5 minutes before your sess: Please arrive 5 minutes before your session. Equipment is available on-site for hire.
pendingTranslations.Price difference will be handled at the: Price difference will be handled at the facility. No additional online payment required.
pendingTranslations.Use the \"Join Waitlist\" button on the: Use the "Join Waitlist" button on the calendar to get notified when booked slots open up.
pendingTranslations.Redirect URI mismatch. Make sure the red: Redirect URI mismatch. Make sure the redirect URI in Google Cloud Console exactly matches:
pendingTranslations.Create a new customer account with login: Create a new customer account with login credentials. The customer can sign in immediately.
pendingTranslations.If an account exists for that email, a p: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
pendingTranslations.Unable to verify payment. If you were ch: Unable to verify payment. If you were charged, please contact support with your session ID.
pendingTranslations.Use the \"Repeat\" button on upcoming bo: Use the "Repeat" button on upcoming bookings to tentatively book the same session next week.
pendingTranslations.⚠️ Select a customer or coach above to e: ⚠️ Select a customer or coach above to enable booking. You can still view existing bookings.
pendingTranslations.All payments are processed in AUD via St: All payments are processed in AUD via Stripe. Customers are redirected to Stripe's hosted checkout page.
pendingTranslations.A new door access code will be generated: A new door access code will be generated for your rescheduled session. Your old code will no longer work.
pendingTranslations.Choose from our qualified coaches to get: Choose from our qualified coaches to get personalised training, technique analysis, and session planning.
pendingTranslations.Your payment details are encrypted and p: Your payment details are encrypted and processed securely by Stripe. We never store your card information.
pendingTranslations.If you believe you were charged, please: If you believe you were charged, please contact support with your booking details and we will resolve it promptly.
pendingTranslations.5 premium lanes available — 3 bowling ma: 5 premium lanes available — 3 bowling machines & 2 run-up nets. Book instantly, pay securely, and start training.
pendingTranslations.⚠️ While locked, the signup form will re: ⚠️ While locked, the signup form will reject new registrations with a message directing users to contact admin.
pendingTranslations.🛡️ Admin manual booking — no payment is: 🛡️ Admin manual booking — no payment is collected. Booking is confirmed instantly on behalf of the customer.
Google OAuth credentials not configured. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in Convex environment variables.
pendingTranslations.Your payment was successful and your cri: Your payment was successful and your cricket net session has been booked. A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.
pendingTranslations.Bookings are recorded automatically base: Bookings are recorded automatically based on coach session prices. Payments are entered by admin. Contact admin for corrections.
pendingTranslations.Please check your connection and try aga: Please check your connection and try again. If the issue persists, athletes may need to assign you as their coach in their profile.
pendingTranslations.Choose from our qualified coaches to get: Choose from our qualified coaches to get personalised training, technique analysis, and session planning. You can select multiple coaches.
pendingTranslations.Manually book any lane up to 12 months a: Manually book any lane up to 12 months ahead on behalf of customers or coaches. Bookings outside the current week cannot be edited by users — only viewed.
pendingTranslations.If a customer cancels or changes their b: If a customer cancels or changes their booking for any of these slots, you will receive an email notification with a direct link to book the newly available time.
pendingTranslations.Select a customer or coach below, then c: Select a customer or coach below, then click any open slot up to 12 months ahead to book on their behalf. Bookings outside the current week cannot be edited by users — only viewed.
pendingTranslations.Cancelled bookings remain on the stateme: Cancelled bookings remain on the statement and are still charged. If another coach or customer books part or all of the cancelled slot, a refill credit is applied to reduce the charge proportionally.
